message:
feat(abi): implement native setjmp/longjmp via x86_64 global_asm

Replace all 7 host delegations in setjmp_abi.rs (release builds) with
native x86_64 assembly that saves/restores callee-saved registers
(rbx, rbp, r12-r15, rsp, rip) directly to/from jmp_buf.

Implementation:
- __sigsetjmp: saves 8 callee-saved registers + return address to
  jmp_buf, optionally saves signal mask via SYS_rt_sigprocmask
- setjmp = __sigsetjmp(env, 1), _setjmp = __sigsetjmp(env, 0)
- longjmp/siglongjmp/_longjmp: restores registers, optionally restores
  signal mask, normalizes val (0→1), jumps to saved return address
- Version script updated to export setjmp/_setjmp/__sigsetjmp/sigsetjmp
- debug_assertions builds retain host delegation for test compatibility
- Smoke tested: echo, ls, git all work under LD_PRELOAD

jmp_buf layout (200 bytes, self-consistent under LD_PRELOAD):
  [0-55]: callee-saved registers (rbx,rbp,r12-r15,rsp,rip)
  [64]: savemask flag (int)
  [72-199]: saved signal mask (__sigset_t)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
